title: Notifications — inbox in-app
description: In-app notification inbox (wave v1.3, STATUS #21) for belajar-with-rahmanef.com. Per-user rows (kind: comment_reply | resource_reviewed | suggestion_status) written ONLY through the internal producer target notifications:create, scheduled fire-and-forget from source features (producer #1: comments addComment reply → parent author; never for self-replies — P0, tested). Recipients read/mark exclusively their own rows (userId from ctx, by_user_read index; other users' rows answer NOT_FOUND). listMine is unread-first + bounded; unreadCount capped for the badge. UI: NotificationBell (unread badge + popover) and NotificationInbox (mark read on click, mark-all-read), deep-linking via the onNavigate seam. Pattern: rr `notifications-center` (bell + popover) adapted onto our Convex hooks.
